intent: Auto-correct SUPERSEDED citation chains: find citers with stale IDs in Cites: headers

body_refs_persisted.context: L-374≈L-371, L-375≈L-372 from concurrent S306 nodes

finding: Cites: header fixes are the actionable target. Body text references to SUPERSEDED lessons typically document history (not claim propagation) and should be left as-is.
asymmetry: SUPERSEDED=low_risk (same content, stale pointer). FALSIFIED=high_risk (wrong content). Current tool treats both equally.
